message:
feat(protocol,command,persist): update PubSub protocol, command execution, and AOF loading

Protocol (fr-protocol):
- Add SMessage variant for shard-channel pub/sub messages
- Update message parsing and serialization paths

Command Execution (fr-command):
- Update command dispatch for new protocol variants
- Lua eval module adjustments for consistency

Persistence (fr-persist):
- AOF (Append-Only File) loading and initialization support
- Replay command log for state reconstruction at startup

REPL:
- Minor updates for server integration compatibility

Conformance:
- Update core_pubsub.json fixture for SMessage variant coverage

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
